query:
SELECT 
  u.username,
  u.name AS full_name,
  u.email,
  u.systemRole AS role,
  tc.name AS company_name,
  tc.subscription_tier,
  u.createdAt AS created
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenant_companies tc ON u.companyId = tc.id
ORDER BY u.systemRole, tc.name, u.username;
